summary: Classified the ten hydrated open PRs independently as requested by the live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected; no close, merge, fix, or PR-open actions are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths are disabled for this job, and the hydrated evidence shows useful open contributor work with proof/review/check blockers rather than boring closeout candidates.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with proof/review history; keep open for normal maintainer review outside this inventory shard.
Not a low-signal or duplicate closeout candidate; useful PR remains open but is blocked by proof, rebase, and unresolved review-bot findings.
Useful focused PR should remain open; merge/fix are disabled and proof/review validation is not complete.
Potentially useful standalone PR, but this job cannot merge and the hydrated review state does not support any closeout action.
Useful but not merge-ready; keep open as independent inventory item with unresolved review/check blockers.
Focused contributor PR remains open for proof/maintainer review; no mutation path is allowed or justified.
Keep open as useful but not merge-ready; no fix or replacement PR may be planned in this job.
Useful independent PR remains open; no boring closeout classification applies.
Keep open as an independent PR requiring proof/maintainer evaluation; do not close based on stale or title-only evidence.
Feature PR needs proof and maintainer/product review; keep open and independent rather than close or escalate the whole cluster.
